name: Negotiator
description: Real-time behavioral signal detection for smart glasses. We don't detect lies. We detect when something doesn't add up.

permissions.microphone: Voice input for ambient conversation analysis and 'negotiate' trigger.
permissions.display: Display behavioral signal insights on the glasses HUD.

ai_declaration.governance: Strictest governance of any NeuroverseOS app. Three-tier enforcement: intent-level (MentraGovernedExecutor), content-level (evaluateGuard with kernel boundary checking), behavioral-level (signal classifier enforces no_single_signal_escalation and no_camera_confidence in code). 8 immutable invariants. simulateWorld() runs live with rule evaluation and gate transitions.
